# StorefrontGrowth

> StorefrontGrowth is a digital marketing and social media marketing agency in Houston, TX serving small and medium businesses in Houston, nearby areas, and across the United States.

StorefrontGrowth helps local and growing businesses attract more customers, convert more leads, and save time with practical marketing systems powered by smart automation. The team combines strategy, execution, technology, and automation into one connected growth system rather than scattered tactics.

## Services
- Website design and development (mobile-first, conversion-focused)
- SEO, AEO, and local search — including local SEO, Google Business Profile, and Google Maps visibility
- Paid advertising — Google Ads and Meta (Facebook/Instagram) Ads, retargeting
- Social media marketing and content
- CRM and AI-powered automation — lead follow-up, review requests, workflow automation

## Areas served
- Houston, Texas
- Greater Houston metro and nearby areas
- Businesses across the United States (served remotely)

## Ideal clients
Small and medium businesses — including salons, spas, gyms, convenience stores, restaurants, and other local and growing businesses.

## Contact
- Website: https://storefrontgrowth.com
- Email: hello@storefrontgrowth.com
